help: Record identification entries for a program-described file (positions 7-46). Describes how an input record relates to the other records in the file.

parameters.name: FILENAME
parameters.help: The name of the file the input record belongs to.

parameters.name: SEQUENCE
parameters.help: The sequence of the record. An alphabetic entry means the sequence is not checked.

parameters.name: NUMBER
parameters.help: 1 = once within the sequence, N = more than once.

parameters.name: OPTION
parameters.help: O = this record type is optional.

parameters.name: RECIDIND
parameters.help: The indicator set on when the record is read.

parameters.name: RECIDCODE
parameters.help: The codes that identify the record: three sets of position, NOT, code part, and character.

parameters.name: COMMENT
parameters.help: The comment area of the specification (positions 81-100).
